Endosopy type: flexi sig, incomplete col: At 13cm from insertion there was a malignant looking mass with an abnormal pit pattern suspicious features for malignancy.
MDT (after 6 week: Decision: MRI Rectum, PET CT. Rediscuss at MDT for formal staging. Patient aware, decision RE treatment following further imaging and discussion.
CEA: Date: Mid rectal caner with associated mesorectal lymph nodes. Multiple nodules within the lungs suspicious for lung metastases. Indeterminate retroperitoneal lymph nodes.
